message:
test(pt-core): extend prechecks coverage with 46 new inline tests (process_triage-aii.7)

Cover PreCheckResult variants, NoopPreCheckProvider (all methods + run_checks
dispatch including VerifyIdentity filtering), SupervisorAction display,
SupervisorInfo construction from systemd units (service/scope/timer) and
parent supervisors, block reason formatting, Display trait, is_main_process
via main_pid, LivePreCheckConfig defaults and DataLossGates conversion,
PreCheckError display, serialization for all types, and Linux-specific live
provider tests (proc reading, process state, session leader blocking,
disabled data-loss gates, supervisor detection). Total: 56 tests (was 10).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
